pi_items.source: Confirmed via setup_task.sh which copies sample_project.xml to this location and uses it as the target file.
Parsed sample_project.xml to verify that task 27 is the original predecessor whose link is removed.
Parsed sample_project.xml to verify the <Name> tag for the task with <UID> 27.
Parsed sample_project.xml and setup_task.sh, confirming task 28 is the one modified to remove the predecessor link.
Parsed sample_project.xml to verify the <Name> tag for the task with <UID> 28.
Parsed sample_project.xml and found the <PredecessorLink> from UID 28 to 27 has <Type>1</Type>, which corresponds to a Finish-to-Start (FS) dependency in the Microsoft Project XML schema.

privileged_info_summary: The project file is located at /home/ga/Projects/current_task.xml. In the original data, the task 'Install storm drainage' (UID 28) has a Finish-to-Start (FS) dependency on 'Rough grade site (cut and fill)' (UID 27), indicated by a PredecessorLink with Type 1. The setup script explicitly removes this dependency link, requiring the agent to restore it.
